evals.prompt: Write a short paragraph promoting our new project management tool for small businesses.
evals.expected_output: A short marketing paragraph that sounds human-written, uses specific benefits, avoids AI tells
expectations: No em dashes (—) appear in the text
No AI tell verbs are used (delve, leverage, optimize, utilize, facilitate, streamline, enhance)
No AI tell adjectives are used (robust, comprehensive, pivotal, transformative, innovative, seamless)
No filler words are used (very, really, actually, basically, simply, ultimately)
Active voice is used throughout
Specific benefits or numbers are included
No sentences start with forbidden opening phrases like 'In today's'
No exclamation points appear

evals.prompt: Rewrite this AI-generated text to sound human: 'In today's fast-paced digital landscape, it's important to note that leveraging robust, comprehensive solutions is pivotal for streamlining your workflow. By utilizing our innovative platform, you can optimize processes and enhance productivity in a seamless manner—ultimately driving transformative results for your organization.'
evals.expected_output: Natural-sounding rewrite with specific details, no AI tells, active voice
expectations: The rewrite contains zero AI tell words from the original
No em dashes are used
The opening does NOT start with 'In today's'
Active voice is used instead of passive constructions
Specific examples or numbers replace vague claims
The text is shorter and clearer than the original
No buzzwords (streamline, optimize, enhance, leverage) appear

evals.prompt: Write a social media post about how our analytics dashboard helped a client save time. Make it sound authentic and specific.
evals.expected_output: Short, authentic-sounding social post with specific numbers, written from a helpful perspective
expectations: Uses 'I' or 'we' perspective, not 'you should'
Includes at least one specific number
No AI tell words appear
No em dashes appear
Tone is conversational and helpful, not preachy
Short sentences and line breaks are used
No exclamation points
